title: Books Reviewed
abstract: ABRAMS, JEANNE E., A View from Abroad: The Story of John and Abigail Adams in Europe by Constance B. Schulz BIGART, ROBERT J., Providing for the People: Economic Change among the Salish and Kootenai Indians, 1875-1910 by Gustave Lester BOONSHOFT, MARK, Aristocratic Education and the Making of the American Republic by John Frederick Bell BRETTLE, ADRIAN, Colossal Ambitions: Confederate Planning for a Post-Civil War World by Brooks Swett GREENBERG, JOSHUA R., Bank Notes and Shinplasters: The Rage for Paper Money in the Early Republic by Danielle Skeehan HATTEM, MICHAEL D., Past and Prologue: Politics and Memory in the American Revolution by Jordan Pellerito LAMPERT, SARA E., Starring Women: Celebrity, Patriarchy, and American Theater, 1790-1850 by Emily Banta LANG, ANDREW F., A Contest of Civilizations: Exposing the Crisis of American Exceptionalism in the Civil War Era by Amanda Bellows TURNER, NICOLE MYERS, Soul Liberty: The Evolution of Black Religious Politics in Postemancipation Virginia by Thomas Strange WAITE, KEVIN, West of Slavery: The Southern Dream of a Transcontinental Empire by Sean Fraga WELCH, KIMBERLY M., Black Litigants in the Antebellum American South by Melissa Milewski WELLS, JAMIN, Shipwrecked: Coastal Disasters and the Making of the American Beach by Anthony J. Stanonis
